name: Telegram bot notifications
description: Delivery log/dedupe plus budget alerts, opt-in household activity, and opt-in weekly digest scheduled sends.

done: Migration 0004 adds telegram_bot_notification_deliveries table with UNIQUE dedupe index.
Budget warning (80%) and exceeded (100%) sent once per budget/user/period via cron daily 9am UTC.
Household activity event-driven on expense create; notifies members with household_activity=true except actor.
Weekly digest cron-triggered; only weekly_digest=true users; uses currencyCode from analytics DTO.
Delivery log records sent/failed/skipped; INSERT OR IGNORE for idempotent dedupe.
All sends via TelegramClient.sendMessage; no Telegram logic outside bot/.
scheduled handler exported from src/index.ts; triggers.crons in wrangler.jsonc.
Fire-and-forget household activity hook doesn't fail expense create.
Oracle review found blocker B1 (wrong actor name) + H1-H3 (currency, corrupt scope); all fixed + 16 orchestrator tests added (incl. B1 regression).

Post-commit review fixes applied: callback identity for callback_query, atomic draft claim on confirm, app-user chat lookup for household notifications, Telegram HTTP error handling, main menu callback handling, and currency-aware bot amount formatting/storage.
verification: ./init.sh test -> 131 tests pass after post-commit review fixes (121 bot unit + 10 auth-telegram).
Oracle review ses_11037a6b3ffe0JjIOD5AuctW09 found B1+H1-H3; fixer resolved; 13/13 acceptance criteria pass.

notes: Dedupe is mandatory. Household activity and weekly digest are opt-in only.
